string.text: The MC-572 Astarta is a high—precision semi-automatic rifle chambered for 12.7?108, developed at the Tula Central Design Bureau. The rifle's automation works by removing powder gases through a side hole in the barrel bore. The gas engine is switched off. The shutter is rotatable, with six stops. Cartridges are supplied from a box magazine with a capacity of 5 rounds.n %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:\n %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: M700 .388 LM Suppressor
